title.en: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION TECHNOLOGIES IN THE PRODUCTION OR PROCESSING OF GOODS

Climate change mitigation technologies in the production process for final industrial or consumer products
Greenhouse gas [GHG] capture, material saving, heat recovery or other energy efficient measures, e.g. motor control, characterised by manufacturing processes, e.g. for rolling metal or metal working
Manufacturing or production processes characterised by the final manufactured product

Efficient use of energy, e.g. using compressed air or pressurized fluid as energy carrier
using renewable energy
Reducing waste in manufacturing processes; Calculations of released waste quantities
Minimising material used in manufacturing processes
Enabling technologies with a potential contribution to greenhouse gas [GHG] emissions mitigation
Total factory control, e.g. smart factories, flexible manufacturing systems [FMS] or integrated manufacturing systems [IMS]
Computing systems specially adapted for manufacturing

Management or planning
